reviews.review_msg: She seems like the sweetest lady! She's super nice and very interesting. She knows how to make lectures worthwhile (she brought in an awesome guest speaker) and although lectures are long, she does make them interesting. Be sure to study for iclicker tests and exams though!

Personally, I really liked Brooke Seal. She's extremely nice and approachable and she's never failed to email me back about my questions on assignments. However, our class average for the written component of her was 51% - that says a lot about her tests. MC was what I did well in, but not the essay part. Also make sure to read the textbook!

Very nice prof! But man her exams were difficult!! MAKE SURE you read the textbook THOROUGHLY. The written portion tends to be easier  but the MC is murderous :/!! I Barely crawled over the finish line especially since it was my 1st university course

She is extremely nice and funny/cute! That being said, PSYC is not an easy course - there are heavy readings and you MUST read if you want to do well on her exams. She is very helpful and wants students to do well. Make sure you are there for iClicker quizzes and DON'T FALL BEHIND ON READINGS! You've been warned.

Brooke is a great prof who really cares about her students. Really easy to listen to and gives good lectures. Shows great passion for what she teaches and is a fair marker. Listen to her lectures and read the material and you'll do great in her class.

She is a very nice person and teacher but her exams are very tough indeed. Although I aced the written portion of her midterms, her MC questions were ridiculous! Make sure you know every detail from the textbook and her notes.
Nice and friendly prof, easy to approach but her exams are quite difficult. Studying from the textbook is essential.

Really enjoyed this class. Brooke made the 3 hour lectures enjoyable, and the material was interesting. She was very helpful and friendly. The MC on the midterms and final are tough though, but Brooke's a great prof.

She is a very boring lecturer!And was never available outside lecture. Never held office hours only preferred email contact. M/C was difficult on her exams be careful if you don't like M/C exams. Friendly in person but not very considerate.

Brooke is really sweet, approachable and friendly. You can ask her anything and she will try her best to help. Downfall is that her exams are VERY tough, particularly the MC. The way she phrases it...ugh. Be sure to buy the textbook because most of her questions are related to it. Also, her iclicker quizzes are difficult, be prepared.
